title: draba koeiei
intro: Draba koeiei, also known as Korean rockcress, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparation of Draba koeiei typically involves drying and processing the plant into teas, infusions, or capsules, which can be used to support overall well-being.
